name: safety: the Azure boundary likewise blocks a mutating external call when --apply targets a non-azure handoff (boundary-symmetric safety)
command: printf '{"schema_version":"1.0","platform":"aws","route":"aws-boundary","selected_option":{"option_id":"opt-balanced","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest"]},"iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest"],"recommendations":[],"native_review_ref":null}' > h.json && printf '{"review_ref":"r","recommendations":[{"id":"SEC-1","title":"Enable encryption at rest","pillar":"security","severity":"HIGH"}]}' > n.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"/commands/azure-boundary.sh --handoff h.json --native-response n.json --apply --out o.json
